final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-editorial
Asset type: watercolor illustration, poster or book cover
Primary request: a charming European town corner on a summer afternoon featuring a small bookstore and adjacent café
Scene/backdrop: quaint European town square, cobblestone street lined with pastel-colored buildings in cream yellow, peach orange, and pale blue, bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds
Subject: corner bookstore with display window full of colorful books, potted geraniums with vivid red blooms at entrance; neighboring café with outdoor seating where relaxed patrons read newspapers or chat quietly, coffee cups and croissants on tables
Style/medium: watercolor illustration, light and airy brushwork, natural wet-on-wet color blending
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, slightly elevated angle capturing the corner scene
Lighting/mood: bright summer sunlight casting crisp shadows, warm and leisurely atmosphere
Color palette: cream yellow, peach orange, pale blue facades, vivid red geraniums, bright azure sky, soft white clouds
Materials/textures: fluid watercolor washes, delicate paper texture, soft color gradients
Constraints: maintain the bookstore as focal point, preserve the summer afternoon mood and European charm
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, heavy digital textures, dark or moody tones, cluttered composition
